query: SELECT id, openId, name, email, role, empresaId, activo, passwordHash IS NOT NULL as tienePassword, lastSignedIn FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%sanchez%' OR email LIKE '%esanchez%' OR name LIKE '%Estefany%' OR name LIKE '%Stephanie%' ORDER BY id;
